title: rubus pilulifer
intro: Rubus pilulifer is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is commonly known as the Himalayan cluster raspberry. The medicinal properties of Rubus pilulifer include its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, and it can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
